sultanTrust.subtitle: Gold Standard is part of {{brand}} — a trusted name in Kuwait’s gold market, from the Central Gold Market to insured delivery nationwide.

securityTrust.title: Authenticity & security, guaranteed
securityTrust.body: Gold Standard brings together every practical layer of bullion protection we can deploy — physical marks, holographic seals, serial tracking, and a Digital Ownership Record — so the modern investor gets lasting certainty, not guesswork.
securityTrust.advantageLead: We were the first in Kuwait to combine a full security stack for investment bullion — including a Digital Ownership Record secured by blockchain technology, security hologram seals, and our own company stamp for an extra layer of trust you can verify.
securityTrust.verifyCtaBody: Scan the QR or enter the serial from your bar or packaging on our authenticity page.

qr.title: Unique serialized QR
qr.description: Every investment piece carries a unique serial identity and QR you can scan on our website to confirm registration in our official catalog.

blockchain.title: Digital Ownership Record
blockchain.description: The first bullion documentation solution of its kind in Kuwait — every investment piece can be linked to a Digital Ownership Record secured by blockchain technology, beyond paper alone.

hologram.title: Security hologram seal
hologram.description: Premium packaging carries a tamper-resistant holographic mark — a first visual check that the bar and seal are genuine before you scan or verify online.

companyStamp.title: Gold Standard company stamp
companyStamp.description: Every piece carries the Gold Standard company stamp alongside official hallmarking — a branded physical mark you can match to our catalog, receipts, and verify page.

ministry.title: Ministry stamp on the gold
ministry.description: Gold is tested and stamped under Kuwait’s Ministry of Commerce and Industry — Precious Metals Department — confirming karat before sale.

receipt.title: Official stamped receipt
receipt.description: Your purchase includes a Gold Standard stamped receipt — clear documentary proof for custody, buyback, and personal or institutional records.

securityTrust.credentialsBody: The same marks of trust you expect from an investment bullion house — official hallmarking, secure payments, insured delivery, and a clear commercial licence.
securityTrust.methodsBody: Each bar and investment piece is designed so you can confirm what you own — independently, quickly, and with a lasting paper and digital trail.

certified.a: Yes — every bar, coin, and piece is sold with clear karat and weight, MOCI precious-metals hallmarking where required, the Gold Standard company stamp, a serial number in our official catalog, and a Digital Ownership Record. Scan the product QR or visit our verify page to confirm registration before you buy.

livePricing.a: Product prices follow live sell rates in KWD per gram, plus making charges shown on each product page. Rates refresh from the market and may update before you pay — the total you confirm at checkout is what you are charged.

buyback.q: Can I sell my gold back?
buyback.a: Yes. Gold Standard offers a buyback on eligible bullion and coins at live sell rates. Visit a branch or contact us for current buyback prices in KWD — the same transparent rates you see on our prices page.

insuredDelivery.a: Yes. Insured shipping is available for online orders across Kuwait. Your order is covered door-to-door, and you can follow status from checkout through delivery.

storage.q: Can I collect or store gold with you?
storage.a: You can pick up at any Gold Standard branch in Kuwait, or choose insured home delivery at checkout. For members with trading accounts, vault lock-in may be available — contact us or ask in-branch for current options.

payments.q: What payment methods do you accept?
payments.a: You can pay with secure KNET on our website or on delivery. Payments are encrypted, and KNET receipts are confirmed on our side before your order is finalized.

home.ourBranchesDesc: Visit any of our branches across Kuwait for personalized service
home.readyToTradeDesc: Create a free account to follow live rates, save alerts, and unlock member benefits on investment coins and bars.

tradeGold.guestDesc: Log in to trade gold by grams or KWD using your wallet balance.

knetDeposit.note: Use KNET to fund your trading wallet in Kuwaiti dinar. Your balance updates for trading as soon as the payment is confirmed on our side (live KNET redirect can be enabled on the server).

knetDeposit.invalidAmount: Enter a valid positive amount in KWD.

tradeGold.confirmReview: Please review the trade details before you continue.

auto.title: AI Trading
auto.intro: Set rate thresholds for this carat. When the same live Prices page rates cross them, the system can buy from your wallet or sell your position automatically (runs on the server; keep Celery worker and beat running).
auto.hintBuy: Buy trigger: when the Prices page buy rate (KWD/g) is at or below your minimum, we buy up to the grams you set (limited by wallet).
auto.hintSell: Sell trigger: when the Prices page sell rate (KWD/g) is at or above your maximum, we sell your holding (all grams or a fixed amount).
auto.hintRates: Rate rows use the same KWD/g buy and sell totals as the Gold prices page for the carat you pick.
auto.manualRefBuyHint: No live buy rate for this carat on the page yet. Enter your reference buy rate (KWD/g), then add an adjustment.
auto.manualRefSellHint: No live sell rate for this carat on the page yet. Enter your reference sell rate (KWD/g), then add an adjustment.
auto.adjustmentHint: Use positive numbers to raise the threshold, negative to lower it.
auto.totalBuyThreshold: Total min buy rate to save
auto.totalSellThreshold: Total max sell rate to save
auto.rateRowFootnote: Same KWD/g as the Gold prices page for this carat. After +, enter extra KWD/g (0 for no change, negative to subtract).
auto.applyBuyQuote: Use current buy quote for this carat
auto.applySellQuote: Use current sell quote for this carat
auto.sellAll: On sell trigger, sell entire position
auto.noRules: No AI trading rules yet. Add one per carat.
auto.needThreshold: When the rule is enabled, set at least a min buy rate and/or max sell rate.
auto.needAutoBuyGrams: Enter a positive auto-buy grams amount when a min buy rate is set.
auto.needAutoSellGrams: Enter auto-sell grams when not selling the full position.

dataDeletionPage.title: Data deletion instructions
dataDeletionPage.intro: You can request deletion of your Gold Standard account data, including related communication records we control.

how.title: How to request deletion
how.body:
Email {{email}} with the subject line “Data Deletion Request”.

Include your full name, registered email and/or phone number, and any details needed to verify account ownership.

verify.title: Verification
verify.body: For security, we may ask for additional verification before processing deletion. If we cannot verify ownership, we may not complete the request.

timeline.title: Timeline
timeline.body: After verification, we process deletion within a reasonable period — typically within 30 days — unless a longer retention period is required by law.

deleted.title: What gets deleted
deleted.body:
• Account profile details maintained in this application
• Non-essential communication records linked to your account
• Other personal data that is not legally required to be retained

retained.title: What may be retained
retained.body: We may retain certain records where required for legal, tax, accounting, security, fraud prevention, dispute resolution, or regulatory compliance.

meta.title: Meta and WhatsApp data
meta.body: If your request relates to WhatsApp or Meta platform data, we process deletion for data controlled by our application. Data controlled directly by Meta may also be subject to Meta’s own deletion processes.

dataDeletionPage.ctaBody: Open your email app with a pre-filled subject, or review our terms first.

licenceModal.title: Commercial licence

aboutPage.title: About us
aboutPage.hero: Gold Standard is a Kuwait investment bullion company — the investment arm of Sultan Gold — manufacturing and supplying high-purity bars, coins, and institutional solutions. We operate under a Ministry of Commerce commercial licence, with MOCI hallmarking, live digital pricing, and insured delivery across Kuwait.
aboutPage.storyTitle: A Kuwait bullion company built for serious investors
aboutPage.storyBody: Gold Standard was established to serve individuals, jewellers, banks, and institutions who want transparent, documented physical gold — not fashion jewellery.

story.p1: We are registered in the State of Kuwait under commercial licence No. 279/2026 issued by the Ministry of Commerce and Industry. Our legal name is Gold Standard Jewellers and Precious Metals Company, and we operate as the dedicated investment channel of Sultan Gold — one of Kuwait’s established gold manufacturing groups.
story.p2: Investment bars, coins, and custom bullion are designed and produced inside Sultan Gold workshops and factories. That in-house capability gives us control over purity, weight, finishing, and packaging — from raw material through inspection, hallmarking, and certificate issuance.
story.p3: Our services centre on buying and selling precious metals with clarity: live KWD rates on the website, secure KNET checkout, product authentication, insured delivery within Kuwait, and buyback programmes under published policy. A digital metal wallet and target-price acquisition tools are rolling out for registered clients.
story.p4: We structure sales with constructive possession principles aligned with Islamic finance, so ownership is documented even when physical delivery follows later. Our goal is a trusted environment where savings, trade, and long-term investment in bullion can happen with confidence — backed by manufacturing depth, regulatory compliance, and technology you can verify.

aboutPage.profileIntro: We combine Kuwait regulatory compliance, Sultan Gold manufacturing heritage, and a modern digital storefront — so every bar and coin is traceable, priced transparently, and built for investment.

kuwait.title: Established in Kuwait
kuwait.body: Gold Standard operates as a Kuwait precious-metals company serving the Central Gold Market and branches nationwide — focused on bullion, not traditional jewellery retail.

licence.title: Ministry of Commerce licence
licence.body: Registered under commercial licence No. 279/2026 with the Ministry of Commerce and Industry — the legal foundation for our bullion trade and institutional supply activities.

manufacturing.title: In-house bullion production
manufacturing.body: As the investment arm of Sultan Gold, we manufacture bars, coins, and custom institutional pieces with disciplined quality control inside Sultan Gold facilities.

moci.title: MOCI hallmark & inspection
moci.body: Investment gold is tested and stamped under Kuwait’s Precious Metals Department rules before sale — confirming karat purity and protecting buyers from unstamped or counterfeit pieces.

digital.title: Digital storefront & live pricing
digital.body: Customers can browse certified products, see live KWD buy/sell rates, pay securely via KNET, and track orders online — with member clubs and institutional pricing where applicable.

authenticity.title: Digital Ownership Record & verification layers
authenticity.body: Kuwait’s first stack to combine a Digital Ownership Record, security hologram seal, company stamp, and serial tracking — an investment experience you can verify at every step.

sharia.title: Sharia-aligned constructive possession
sharia.body: We structure transactions with constructive possession principles so ownership transfers in a Sharia-valid manner, with insured custody until pickup or insured delivery — documented in our terms.

reach.title: Clients we serve
reach.body: From individual savers and family offices to jewellers, bullion dealers, banks, and corporate buyers — we support wealth preservation, inventory supply, and institutional programmes.

aboutPage.digitalChannelBody: Browse MOCI-hallmarked investment products at live Kuwait rates, complete checkout with KNET, and verify authenticity from our official catalog — with metal holdings tools launching for registered accounts.
aboutPage.securityTitle: The most complete bullion security stack in Kuwait
aboutPage.securityIntro: We built Gold Standard around verification you can repeat — not promises you cannot check. That means combining every protection layer that makes sense for physical gold: official hallmarking, our company stamp, holographic seals, serialised QR, stamped receipts, and a Digital Ownership Record.
aboutPage.securityLead: Gold Standard was the first in Kuwait to bring this full security model to investment bullion — including the Digital Ownership Record secured by blockchain technology, so ownership is documented beyond the counter.

coins.title: Coins, bars
coins.description: Certified pieces with clear karat, weight, and authenticity you can verify.

prices.title: Live KWD rates
prices.description: Buy and sell prices updated from the market so you always see transparent numbers.

clubs.title: Member clubs
clubs.description: Invite-based clubs unlock member buy rates and shared offers at checkout.

parent.title: Parent company
parent.description: Sultan Gold — industrial expertise and production infrastructure behind every piece.

manufacture.title: Made in-house
manufacture.description: Design and manufacturing inside Sultan Gold facilities, with disciplined quality control.

specialty.title: Investment specialty
specialty.description: Bars, coins, OEM / private label, and institutional supply — clarity over ornament.

aboutPage.valuesIntro: From raw material selection through manufacturing, inspection, and packaging, we follow investment-bullion standards — with transparent pricing and authenticity you can check.
aboutPage.missionBody: Deliver reliable investment gold for individuals and institutions — combining certified purity, transparent KWD pricing, documented ownership, insured delivery, and practical buyback under clear policy.
aboutPage.visionBody: To become the preferred choice for investors — individuals and companies — seeking distinguished bullion services in Kuwait and the Gulf: manufacturing depth, regulatory compliance, digital convenience, and trust that lasts beyond a single transaction.
aboutPage.ctaTitle: See live prices or visit a branch
aboutPage.ctaBody: Check today’s rates in KWD, or find a Gold Standard location near you.
aboutPage.licenceBody: Gold Standard operates as a licensed precious-metals business in Kuwait. Investment gold sold through our channels is tested and stamped under Ministry of Commerce and Industry (MOCI) Precious Metals Department rules before retail — Licence No. 279/2026.
aboutPage.licenceContactForCopy: For a copy of our commercial registration, contact us at info@goldstandardkw.com or visit any branch.
aboutPage.licenceMociBody: Under Kuwait law, gold and precious metals must be tested and stamped by the Ministry of Commerce and Industry — Precious Metals Department (ختم المعادن الثمينة). The official stamp confirms karat purity and protects buyers from unstamped or counterfeit pieces.
aboutPage.licenceTradeBody: We supply coins and bars with transparent live KWD pricing, secure KNET checkout, insured delivery, and product verification through our official catalog and authenticity tools.

transparency.title: Transparent pricing
transparency.description: Live rates and charges shown clearly — so institutions and investors know the number before they commit.

quality.title: Certified purity
quality.description: Bars and coins checked for karat and authenticity before they reach you.

service.title: Institutional care
service.description: Support for orders, wholesale programmes, and product documentation during business hours.

delivery.title: Insured delivery
delivery.description: Orders ship insured across Kuwait with tracking from payment to door.

trust.title: Trust & Transparency
trust.description: We believe in complete transparency in our pricing and operations.

customer.title: Customer First
customer.description: Our customers are at the heart of everything we do.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: We continuously evolve to provide the best trading experience.

founded.title: Founded
founded.description: Started as a small gold trading shop in Kuwait City

firstBranch.title: First Branch
firstBranch.description: Opened our first branch in the Central Gold Market

aboutPage.offeringsIntro: We do more than sell gold — we manufacture, document, and supply investment bullion for individuals and institutions.
aboutPage.clientsIntro: Our clients include savers building long-term positions, jewellers sourcing certified inventory, bullion desks, banks, corporate treasuries, and government-related entities — anyone who needs documented physical gold with professional service.
aboutPage.partnersIntro: Gold Standard is built on trusted relationships — from legal counsel and manufacturing heritage to banking infrastructure that supports secure, Sharia-aligned commerce.
aboutPage.partnersNote: We continue to expand our partner network across compliance, logistics, and institutional channels.
aboutPage.partnersScrollHint: Swipe or use arrows to browse partners
aboutPage.partnersMoreBody: Additional strategic partnerships are on the way — in manufacturing, custody, and institutional distribution.

wathaq.name: Wathaq Law Firm & Legal Consultations
wathaq.body: The company’s legal representative — supporting corporate governance, contracts, regulatory filings, and ongoing legal advisory for Gold Standard’s operations.

sultanGold.name: Sultan Gold
sultanGold.body: Our parent brand and manufacturing backbone — investment bullion is produced inside Sultan Gold workshops with the industrial depth behind Kuwait’s gold market.

kfh.name: Kuwait Finance House (KFH)
kfh.body: A leading Islamic financial institution in Kuwait — supporting the banking and payment ecosystem around secure, compliant customer transactions.

auth.loginRequiredToBuyDesc: Purchases require a Gold Standard account. Sign in or create one to add items and check out.
auth.verificationRequiredToBuyDesc: Your account must be verified before you can buy gold. Open your profile or contact support if you need help.
auth.signInNudgeBody: Save your cart, track orders, and check out smoothly with your Google account.
auth.googleSignInFailed: Google sign-in failed. Please try again.
auth.appleSignInFailed: Apple sign-in failed. Please try again.
auth.orEmailPhone: or sign in with email / phone
auth.captchaFailed: Security verification failed. Please try again.
auth.accountInactive: Your account is inactive. Please contact the administrator.
auth.accountInactiveWithAdmin: Your account is inactive. Please contact the administrator at {{email}}.
auth.roleHint: Optional — defaults to Customer. Staff roles are not available on this form.
auth.roleCustomer: Customer — shop access and member benefits
auth.roleLongTerm: Long term customer — shop access and member benefits
auth.roleTrader: Trader — shop access and member benefits
auth.countryRequired: Please select your country of residence.
auth.civilIdHint: Kuwait Civil ID (12 digits). Identity verification may be requested before trading.
auth.nationalityHint: Your country of nationality (ISO code is stored for your account).
auth.termsAgreement: I agree to the <legalLink>Terms and Conditions & Privacy Policy</legalLink>.
auth.termsAcceptRequired: Please accept the Terms and Conditions & Privacy Policy to continue.
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
auth.registerFailed: Failed to create account. Please try again.

flow.registerSubtitle: A few short steps — then you’re in.
flow.emailVerifyHint: We’ll send a one-time code by email to confirm your account.
flow.whatsappVerifyHint: We’ll send a one-time code on WhatsApp to confirm your account.
flow.passwordHint: At least 8 characters. Mix letters and numbers for a stronger password.
flow.bothContactsHint: We need both email and mobile so you can confirm via Amazon SES or WhatsApp.
flow.signInPreferenceHint: Choose how you usually sign in — you can still verify by email or WhatsApp.
flow.verifyChannelHint: Confirm your account with a code sent by email or WhatsApp.

kyc.skipHint: You can skip these for now and finish them later in your profile.
kyc.skippedToast: Verification questions skipped — complete them in your profile when ready.
kyc.incompleteBanner: Your profile is incomplete. Please answer the Ministry of Commerce verification questions.
kyc.completeHint: Required under Ministry of Commerce customer due-diligence rules. Complete them to finish your profile.

ministry.title: KYC Update as per MOCI request
ministry.introBody: To proceed please complete the following data
ministry.jobPlaceholder: Enter your profession or job title
ministry.declareRequired: Please confirm the declaration to continue
ministry.thanksBody: Your answer has been sent successfully. Thank you for participating.

forgotPasswordPage.title: Forgot password
forgotPasswordPage.subtitleRequest: We'll send a secure one-time code to reset your password
forgotPasswordPage.subtitleOtp: Enter the code we sent you
forgotPasswordPage.channelHint: Receive your reset code by email (Amazon SES) or WhatsApp.
forgotPasswordPage.otpHint: Check your inbox (and spam folder) for the 6-digit code.
forgotPasswordPage.useDifferent: Use a different email or phone

toasts.resetSent: If this account exists, a reset code has been sent.
toasts.sendFailed: Could not send the reset code. Try again or contact support.
toasts.emailSendFailed: Email could not be sent. Try again later.
toasts.codeVerified: Code verified. Set your new password.
toasts.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
toasts.resetSuccess: Password reset. You can sign in now.
toasts.resetFailed: Could not reset password. Try again.

auth.authTransitionHint: Securing your session — this may take a moment on slower connections.

verifyAccount.title: Confirm your account
verifyAccount.subtitle: For security, confirm with a one-time code sent by email (Amazon SES) or WhatsApp.
verifyAccount.sendFailed: Could not send the code. Try again.

customerScreening.title: Name screening
customerScreening.intro: Official name screening by Gold Standard — quick verification before completing a transaction or opening an account.

search.title: Instant search
search.body: Enter the full name and receive a result within seconds.

report.title: Reference report
report.body: Match or no-match with a reference ID for your records.

data.title: Trusted data
data.body: Sanctions data supported by OpenSanctions (Berlin, Germany).

customerScreening.similarityExactNote: The name matches a registry record exactly.
customerScreening.matchAdviceExact: Stop the transaction and refer to your compliance officer.
customerScreening.matchAdviceFuzzy: The entered name is similar to a registry record but not an exact match — review the matched record before proceeding.
customerScreening.clearAdvice: No match found for "{{name}}" in the current registry.
customerScreening.endpointUnavailable: Screening is not live on the server yet. Please try again later or contact support.
customerScreening.attribution: Sanctions data supported by OpenSanctions (Berlin, Germany).

publicKyc.title: Customer KYC questionnaire for Ministry of Commerce due diligence
publicKyc.subtitle: A professional, free tool for jewellers, traders, and businesses in Kuwait to collect customer due-diligence answers — purpose of purchase, source of funds, income, PEP, and employment — aligned with MOCI expectations.
publicKyc.pricesBannerTitle: Verify your customers with our MOCI KYC form
publicKyc.pricesBannerBody: Free due-diligence questionnaire for Kuwait businesses — print-ready answers for your compliance file.

compliance.title: MOCI-aligned questions
compliance.body: Purpose, source of funds, income band, PEP status, employment sector, and job title — the same structure used for regulated customer updates.

customers.title: Built for your counter
customers.body: Open on a phone or desktop, fill with the customer present, then print or save a clear summary for your records.

kuwait.title: Local reference for Kuwait
kuwait.body: Designed for the Kuwait market in Arabic and English — a practical reference tool that also strengthens Gold Standard’s local SEO footprint.

how.1: Open the form and complete the Ministry-style questions with your customer.
how.3: Print or keep a copy for your compliance file. Gold Standard account holders can also save answers to their profile after sign-in.

publicKyc.disclaimer: This tool helps collect due-diligence answers for your internal records. It does not replace legal advice or official Ministry filings. Gold Standard is not the regulator of your business.

stock.unavailableHint: This item is not available for purchase right now.
stock.cartBlocked: Remove out-of-stock items to continue checkout.

checkoutPayment.title: Checkout payment methods
checkoutPayment.intro: KNET and Wallet are always shown at checkout. Turn on the options below if you also want credit card or cash on delivery.
checkoutPayment.alwaysOnHint: KNET and Wallet cannot be disabled from here.
checkoutPayment.knetCodOnlyHint: Checkout is limited to KNET and cash on delivery (COD). Credit card and wallet are hidden.
checkoutPayment.codAlwaysOnHint: Cash on delivery is always enabled for customer checkout.
checkoutPayment.creditCardHint: Shown as a payment choice on the web and app checkout.
checkoutPayment.codHint: Shown as “cash on delivery” on checkout (stored as cash on the order).
checkoutPayment.shippingChargeHint: Applied to checkout totals when customer chooses physical delivery. Set 0 for free shipping.

admin.inventorySubtitle: Stock by branch, adjustments with audit trail, and low-stock monitoring.
admin.inventoryNoRows: No inventory rows match your filters.
admin.inventoryThresholdHint: You get a low alert when available quantity is at or below this number.
admin.inventoryInvalidQty: Enter a valid non-negative whole number for quantity.
admin.inventoryInvalidThreshold: Enter a valid non-negative whole number for threshold.
admin.initialStockQtyHint: On-hand count at the branch below when the product is created. Creates the inventory row and an initial stock log.
admin.initialStockBranchHint: Defaults to your main branch if not selected.

invoiceTerms.title: Invoice Terms & Conditions
invoiceTerms.subtitle: These lines appear on sale invoices (HTML preview and PDF). Drag order with the number field: lower numbers appear first.
invoiceTerms.fallbackHint: If no active lines are saved here, the invoice uses built-in default wording until you add terms below.
invoiceTerms.contentPlaceholder: Enter the full sentence or clause…
invoiceTerms.empty: No terms saved yet. Add your first term above, or the invoice will use default text.
invoiceTerms.saveFailed: Could not save. Check that you are logged in as staff and try again.
invoiceTerms.contentRequired: Enter the term text before saving.

admin.clubsSubtitle: View clubs and grant discount offers to customers (used at checkout; new club members inherit the head's active offers).
admin.clubFormationIntro: Set the minimum completed orders required to create a club, and how many non-head members a head may invite based on their completed orders. Invite links do not require invitees to meet the minimum orders rule.
admin.clubFormationMinOrdersLabel: Minimum completed orders (create a club only)
admin.clubFormationMinOrdersHint: Customers need at least this many completed orders before they can create their own club. Joining an existing club with a valid invite link does not require this.
admin.clubFormationPerMemberLabel: Completed orders per extra member slot (head)
admin.clubFormationPerMemberHint: Leave empty to use the same number as above. The head gets one additional member slot for each full block of N completed orders (e.g. N = 5: 1 slot with 5–9 orders, 2 slots with 10–14, 3 with 15–19, …). If the minimum above is 0 and this field is empty, there is no order-based cap on extra members.
admin.clubFormationPerSlotInvalid: “Orders per slot” must be a non-negative whole number or empty.
admin.grantOfferHint: Open the club menu, search inside it, pick a club, then set a title and either a percent discount or fixed KWD off. The same offer is granted to all members in that club and applies at checkout.
admin.gramsSoldDesc: Total weight (grams) of gold sold in the selected date range.
admin.accountingSubtitle: Chart of accounts, journal entries, purchases, expenses, and financial reports
admin.name: Name
admin.welcomeBack: Welcome back! Metrics below follow your selected period.
admin.tradingGoldPoolIntro: Caps are the maximum total customer virtual grams per carat. Available = reserve minus what customers already hold. Buys are rejected if they would exceed the cap.
admin.tradingGoldPoolLoadError: Could not load trading pool data.
admin.invalidDateRange: Start date must be on or before end date.
admin.lowStockSnapshotNote: Live inventory levels (always current; not filtered by the reporting period above).
admin.noOrdersInDateRange: No orders in the selected date range.
admin.ordersDateRangeHint: Filter orders by sale date. “All time” loads recent orders (up to 500).
admin.expensesSubtitle: Expense transactions and summary by category
admin.noPurchasesFound: No purchases found. Add a purchase to record merchant buys and receive product into inventory.
admin.purchasesSubtitleLong: Purchase from merchants; link product to receive into inventory.
admin.financialReportsSubtitle: Profit & Loss and Balance Sheet — professional accounting view
admin.bankChangeRequestsSubtitle: Approve or reject customer-submitted payout account updates.
admin.tradingBuybacksSubtitle: Gold buybacks: customers sell gold to the store (sell rate). Admin purchases from merchants are under Accounting → Purchases.

userDashboard.pageSubtitle: Manage your profile, orders, saved address, and notifications.

notificationsPanel.intro: Price reminders you set on the Prices page.
notificationsPanel.deltaActive: Rate changes by {{delta}} KWD/g from your set baseline.
notificationsPanel.deltaTriggered: Rate moved by {{delta}} KWD/g from your set baseline.

tradeGoldPanel.title: Trade gold
tradeGoldPanel.subtitle: Buy or sell virtual gold instantly by grams or KWD using your wallet balance.

club.title: My club
club.description: You can belong to one club at a time. The club head can invite friends; new members receive a copy of the head's active offers (discounts). You can create your own club.
club.loadFailed: Could not load your club right now.
club.notInClub: You are not in a club yet. Create one with a name, or open an invite link from a friend.
club.inviteFriendsHint: Create an invite link — it stays here for up to 30 days (until it expires or reaches its join limit). Reloading the page will not remove it.
club.renameClubHint: As club head, you can change the name anytime.
club.memberLimitUnlimited: Member invites: no order-based cap (admin minimum is 0 or only access rules apply).
club.memberLimitCapped: Non-head members: {{current}} / {{limit}} ({{remaining}} invite(s) left). Your completed orders: {{orders}}. Rule: one extra member slot per {{step}} completed orders.
club.memberNextSlotHint: Next member slot unlocks when you reach {{nextAt}} completed orders.
club.inviteBlockedHint: Invite sharing is disabled because your club no longer meets the admin criteria for adding members.
club.dissolveConfirm: Dissolve this club for all members? You can create a new club afterwards.
club.offersHint: Best offer applies automatically at checkout (order subtotal).

share.join: Join my club on Gold Standard.
share.joinWithName: Join my club "{{clubName}}" on Gold Standard.

toasts.inviteBlocked: Invite sharing is disabled until your club meets the admin criteria again.

profile.title: Profile Information
profile.identityDocumentsHint: Upload your Civil ID front and back. If already uploaded, we will show a confirmation below.

toasts.customerProfileNotFoundForUpload: Could not load your customer profile to save ID documents. Please refresh the page or contact support.

addresses.title: Saved address
addresses.subtitle: Keep your delivery details up to date. Checkout can load these fields when you are signed in.
addresses.noProfile: We could not load your customer profile. Please sign in again or contact support if this continues.
addresses.saveFailed: Could not save your address. Check the fields and try again.
addresses.checkoutHint: If shipping fields on checkout are empty, we fill them from this saved address.

toasts.orderIdMissingInvoice: Order ID missing; cannot load invoice.

lockedGold.heroHint: Gold you bought with “Lock in vault” — track your fund, grams of gold, and remaining products here.
lockedGold.currentFundHint: This is your current fund after buying and selling gold through the platform.
lockedGold.noLockedGold: No locked gold. Choose “Lock in vault” at checkout to keep gold in your account and sell back later.
lockedGold.totalLockedGoldHint: Sum of all grams still locked in your account. You can sell part or all of it from the Sell gold page.
lockedGold.confirmSellHint: Please review the sell details. After confirmation, the amount will be credited to your fund.
lockedGold.invoicePreviewHint: This is your sell invoice preview. You can also view and download the receipt later from the Transactions tab.

withdrawModal.title: Withdraw to bank account
withdrawModal.hint: Enter the amount to withdraw. It will be transferred to your registered bank account.

toasts.withdrawRequested: Withdrawal requested. Funds will be transferred to your registered bank account.

bankAccount.title: Bank account
bankAccount.hint: Add your bank account for payouts when selling gold. We will verify the IBAN proof with your bank.
bankAccount.hintApproval:
To update your bank details, submit a change request below. An administrator must approve it before your saved payout account is updated.

After a request is approved or rejected, you can submit a new change request whenever you need to update your payout account.
bankAccount.customerProfileNotFoundLong: Customer profile not found. Please contact support if this problem continues.
bankAccount.currentSavedHint: These are the bank details we use today. They change only after an admin approves a request.
bankAccount.pendingBody: Your new bank details have been submitted. You cannot send another request until this one is approved or rejected.
bankAccount.rejectedLockedHint: You cannot submit new bank details from your dashboard after a rejection. Please contact support if you believe this was a mistake or you need to update your payout account.
bankAccount.rejectedResubmitHint: Review the reason above, then submit a new request below with corrected bank details and proof if needed.
bankAccount.proofOptionalHint: Optional for this request — attach a bank letter or statement if needed.
bankAccount.ibanPlaceholder: KW00 XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX
bankAccount.uploadIbanProof: Upload IBAN proof (bank statement or letter)

toasts.failedToSaveBankAccountDetails: Failed to save bank account details
toasts.requestSubmitted: Change request submitted. We will notify you after review.

transactions.title: Transaction history
transactions.hint: All movements in your fund: deposits, withdrawals, and gold trading.
transactions.noTransactionsInRange: No transactions match the selected dates. Try widening the range or clear the filters.
transactions.dateRangeHint: Optionally set from/to dates to filter the table, then download a Word document (.docx) with a formatted table. Open it in Microsoft Word or compatible apps; print from there if you need a paper copy.
transactions.rangeInvalid: Start date must be on or before the end date.

wordDoc.title: Wallet transaction statement
wordDoc.brandTagline: Your trusted partner for investment gold bullion in Kuwait. Premium products with transparent pricing.
wordDoc.brandAddress: Gold Standard · No. 147, Central Gold Market, 1st Floor, Kuwait City 85951
wordDoc.brandHours: Sat–Thu: 9:00 AM–9:00 PM · Fri: 2:00 PM–9:00 PM

transactions.officialSellReceiptHint: This is your official sell receipt. You can print or save it as PDF using your browser.

toasts.noReceiptReference: No receipt reference found for this transaction
toasts.invalidDateRange: Fix the date range before downloading.
toasts.downloadRangeEmpty: No transactions to download for this range.
toasts.downloadFailed: Could not build the Word file. Please try again.

tradingPage.title: Trading desk — coming soon
tradingPage.subtitle: We are preparing a professional gold trading experience — live market tools, secure custody options, and institutional-grade controls — built on the trading infrastructure already in progress at Gold Standard.
tradingPage.countdownReady: Launch window reached — final checks in progress
tradingPage.pillarsTitle: A trading experience worthy of bullion
tradingPage.pillarsBody: Designed for serious investors and institutions — not speculation theatre. Clear pricing, controlled access, and documentation you can rely on.

live.title: Market-linked execution
live.description: Transparent rates and order flows aligned with live gold markets in Kuwait.

custody.title: Custody & settlement
custody.description: Secure handling paths for physical and vaulted positions as features roll out.

compliance.title: Licensed discipline
compliance.description: Built within Gold Standard’s licensed precious-metals framework and audit-ready processes.

tradingPage.noteTitle: Why trading is not live yet
tradingPage.noteBody: Core trading logic is already under development. We will open the public desk only when pricing, custody, and compliance flows meet the same standard we apply to physical bullion.

holdingsPage.title: Gold holdings
holdingsPage.subtitle: Build allocated gold in grams at today’s market rate — your metal wallet for long-term positioning, without the noise of a dealing room.
holdingsPage.plannerHint: Choose a weight from 5 g to 1 kg — we quote live 24K before you commit.
holdingsPage.liveNote: Updates with our public price feed
holdingsPage.gramsLabel: How much gold do you want to hold?
holdingsPage.instantBuyHint: Acquire at the live rate the moment you confirm.
holdingsPage.targetBuyHint: Set a KWD/g level — we execute when the market reaches it.
holdingsPage.targetPriceLabel: Your target buy price (KWD per gram)
holdingsPage.targetTooHigh: Target must be below the current live buy rate.
holdingsPage.targetExplain: We will hold your instruction and notify you when execution is available.
holdingsPage.previewHint: Preview only — execution opens after launch.
holdingsPage.devBody: Holdings and automated execution are being finished to the same standard as our physical bullion desk. You can explore amounts and rates today; orders will open once compliance and settlement flows are live.

secure.title: Allocated & documented
secure.body: Every gram is recorded against your account with Sharia-aligned constructive possession.

live.title: Market-linked pricing
live.body: Quotes follow our licensed Kuwait buy/sell feed — the same rates you see on Prices.

clear.title: You choose the size
clear.body: From a few grams to a full kilo — scale at your pace, on your timeline.

toasts.instant: Instant buy opens with the metal wallet launch.
toasts.target: Target-price orders will be available at launch.
toasts.description: Thank you for exploring — we are putting the final pieces in place.

digitalOwnership.title: Digital Ownership Record
digitalOwnership.securedBy: Ownership Record Secured by Blockchain Technology
digitalOwnership.body: The ownership record is protected using blockchain technology.
digitalOwnership.certificateBody: This ownership certificate is linked to a secure digital ownership record protected with blockchain technology.
